mapper.select: SELECT config_value FROM km_system_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} LIMIT 1
SELECT config_key AS configKey, config_value AS configValue FROM km_system_config
mapper.update: UPDATE km_system_config SET config_value = #{configValue}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'embedding.model' THEN config_value END) AS model, MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'embedding.api_base' THEN config_value END) AS apiBase, MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'embedding.api_key' THEN config_value END) AS apiKey, MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'embedding.dimension' THEN config_value END) AS dimension FROM km_system_config WHERE config_key IN ('embedding.model','embedding.api_base','embedding.api_key','embedding.dimension')

SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'rerank.model' THEN config_value END) AS model, MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'rerank.api_base' THEN config_value END) AS apiBase, MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'rerank.api_key' THEN config_value END) AS apiKey, MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'rerank.top_n' THEN config_value END) AS topN, MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'rerank.threshold' THEN config_value END) AS threshold FROM km_system_config WHERE config_key IN ('rerank.model','rerank.api_base','rerank.api_key','rerank.top_n','rerank.threshold')

SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'parser.paddleocr_enabled' THEN config_value END) AS paddleocrEnabled, MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'parser.max_concurrent_tasks' THEN config_value END) AS maxConcurrentTasks, MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'parser.max_retry_count' THEN config_value END) AS maxRetryCount, MAX(CASE WHEN config_key = 'parser.timeout_seconds' THEN config_value END) AS timeoutSeconds FROM km_system_config WHERE config_key IN ('parser.paddleocr_enabled','parser.max_concurrent_tasks','parser.max_retry_count','parser.timeout_seconds')
